title: Bellamy Mocks the Dreamers
description: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What a bunch of dense retards.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: And what do you think you're doin'...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We still haven't learned a thing!

summary: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
